title: Aesthetic Grass
description: Improving grass & making it look more dynamic! Only works with Continuity or Optifine.
body:
## About

Grass seems a bit boring? I think so too, which is why i created this pack, which introduces dynamic grass textures - the textures adapt to their surrounding blocks! All while maintaining the vanilla spirit and only Continuity (or Optifine) required!

## How it looks
**With my texturepack**

![Here's what it looks like for hills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06f95ebe3043384a277e6757f6aa9d6d12ae3767.jpeg)
![Here's what it looks like in the jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5fe992bbeb7ad1615583cbe11a8f9b030c73eb7.jpeg)

**Vanilla**

![Here's vanilla Minecraft for comparison!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c84aefbe47f44d0b33b33451989113d9a62500d0.jpeg)

## Installation & Extras

Minimal installation required! Just download the pack and install the Continuity Mod.

[You want something more vanilla? Check out my other Grass-changing pack - which looks like Optifine's grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/optigrass)

It is an original pack by me (SussyBauarbeiter). I appreciate anyone using this pack as inspiration/incorporating it in your packs - when credit to original code is given - but please don't directly steal :)
